name: Grand Theft Auto
description: An action-packed open-world adventure where players live through crime, chaos, and high-stakes missions across a sprawling city filled with side activities, rival gangs, and memorable characters.

name: NBA 2k26
description: A polished basketball experience with realistic gameplay, updated rosters, and exciting stadium atmosphere that brings the sport to life from the opening tip to the final buzzer.

name: Call Of Duty Black Ops 7
description: A fast-paced military shooter packed with modern weapons, tactical team play, and cinematic combat zones that reward quick thinking and strong teamwork.

name: Fortnite
description: A vibrant battle royale experience where players build, fight, and survive across a constantly changing island with creative tools, quick matches, and huge community events.

name: College Football 27
description: A high-energy football sim that delivers dynamic stadiums, realistic team play, and responsive controls for fans who want an exciting and authentic college gridiron experience.

name: UFC 6
description: An intense mixed martial arts game that focuses on realistic striking, dramatic matchups, and the pressure of championship-level cage action from start to finish.

name: ROBLOX
description: A massive online platform where players can create, explore, and enjoy user-generated worlds, mini-games, and social experiences in almost any style imaginable.

name: SKATE
description: An immersive skateboarding game that lets players pull off tricks, explore urban spaces, and build their own style through creative street sessions and challenges.

name: Minecraft
description: A creative sandbox adventure where players can build elaborate worlds, gather resources, and survive or explore in a nearly limitless block-based universe.

name: Watch Dogs 2
description: An open-world hacking adventure set in a bright, tech-driven city where players use clever strategy, gadgets, and fast movement to challenge powerful corporations.
